titleStmt.title: SII 38.571: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 571. (A.R. No. 571 of 1912.) LĒPĀKSHI, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT. On the east wall, second prākāra, Vīrabhadra temple.

p.hi: King: Achyutarāya Year: Śaka 1459, Hemaḷambi, Jyeshṭha, ba. di. 10, Sōmavāra = 2nd June 1537 A.D. However, the week day was Saturday.

summary.p: This registers a sale-deed of land made by the mahājanas of Kañchasamudra alias Pratāpa Dēvarāyapura to the gods Pāpavināśadēva, Vīrēśvara and Raghunātha of Lēpākshi. During the reign-period of Dēvarāya the village Kañchasamudra, renamed as Pratāpa Dēvarāyapura was made a sarvamānya-agrahāra. The record refers to three great gifts made by him. The gifted village was situated near Lēpākshi of Sādali-vēṇṭe in Roda-nāḍu of Penugoṇḍe-rājya.
The specified lands were sold for one hundred gaṭṭi-varaha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Each line begins with ‘O’śubhamastu . lēpākṣi dakṣiṇakaṁci . samudrākhyāgrahārake . pratāpadēvarāyēṁdra . puranāmātaurā(ṁ)nvita . śrī pāpanāśaliṁgasya . vīrabhadrēśvaraśya ca . viṣṇōśrīraghunā
thasya naivēdyādi samṛdhayē . krayādilabdhakṣētrasya . patraśāsanapaddhatiḥ likhyatē lōkavikhyātyai . śāsanēsmin śilāmayē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1459 neya hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada jēṣṭhaba 10 sōmavāradalū . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
vīra Acutadēva mahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁ geyivutaṁ Iralu . kaṁcasamudrake pratināmavāda pratāpadēvarāyapuraveṁba sa¨rvamānyada Agrahārada Asēṣa
vidvan mahājanaṁgaḷu . lēpākṣada pāpavināśadēvaru vīrēśvaradēvaru raghunāthadēvarugaḷige koṭa bhumikrayapatradakramaveteṁdare . śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpadēva mahārāyaru tuṁgabhadrā tīra śrī virūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiyalu . kāmadhēnu kalpavṛkṣa viśvacakraveṁba I mūru ma
hādānavanū māḍi Ā dāna(ta)daṁgavāgi dhāreyaneradu koṭadu . penugoṁḍerājya rodanāḍoḷagaṇa sādalivēṁṭeyada lēpākṣagrāmada samīpavāda kaṁ
casamudrake pratināmavāda pratāpadēvarāyapuraveṁba sa¨rvamānyada Agrahāradalū . naṁma grāmadoḷagāgi saluvadu . basavarsara kuṁṭe Ā kuṁṭe
keḷagaṇa gade gōṭurahaḷi Ā haḷige saluva hola . basirimarana staḷada gade Ā gadege saluva yāṁtagaḷu I mūru sthaḷavanū nāvu nimage krayava ko
ṭu niṁma kaiyalū salisikoṁḍadu gaṭivaraha 100 Akṣāradalu nūru gaṭi varahānu sākalyavāgi dinada lekā ravi sasikada hāṁge salisikoṁḍevu . I basavarsara
kuṁṭe Ā kuṁṭe keḷagaṇa gade . I gōṭurahaḷi haḷige saluvahola . basirimarana sthalada gade saluva yāṁtagaḷu Iṣṭanū nāvu nimage krayava koṭevāda kāraṇa nīvu niṁma Amṛ
tapaḍi naivēdyagaḷanū māḍisikoḍu sukhadalu Anubhavisaluḷavaru Ivake mēre vivarā . mūḍalige basavarsara kuṁṭe mūḍaṇa kōḍi lēpākṣake pōha vubhaya mā¨rgada
dāri mēre Āgñēyadikige beṁḍara guyalagade mēre . teṁkalige siṁgarsara kuṁṭe baḍagaṇa kōḍi mēreyāgi basirimarada yāṁtada bāvigaḷu mēre . paḍuvaṇadikige tiṁmōjana ho
lana mēre . baḍagaṇadikige lēpākṣinaṁma kaṁcasamudrada hola mēre śāsanada kalugaḷu mēre . Ivaroḷagāgi gṛhārāma kṣētra nidhi nikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddhasādyaṁgaḷeṁ .
ba Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmya sa¨rvōtpati samastabaḷi sahitavāgi Ācaṁdrākasthayi Āgi Anubhavisaluḷavarū yeṁdu koṭa bhūmi krayapatra koṭa mahājanaṁgaḷa
barahagaḷu mūlasādanadali Idhāvu .
Digital edition of SII 38.571 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
